description: GSR IV Acquisition Corp. does not have significant operations. It focuses on effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, recapitalization, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. GSR IV Acquisition Corp. was incorporated in 2023 and is based in Austin, Texas.
